## Bird Behaviour {#birdbehav}

**Link to the database: ** [http://dx.doi.org/10.6084/m9.figshare.1499292](http://dx.doi.org/10.6084/m9.figshare.1499292)

The database can also be accessed programmatically through the [`traitdata` R package](https://github.com/RS-eco/traitdata).

**Link to the publication: ** [https://doi.org/10.1038/sdata.2015.61](https://doi.org/10.1038/sdata.2015.61)

The data below is obtained from `traitdata` R package.
